chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-4029 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) For order as to non-prosecution 11.9.2025 None present for the petitioner -------------------------------- This is an old petition of 2023, which is over two years ago. It was last taken up on 27.9.2023, which is almost two years ago when two weeks’ time was allowed for compliance. Despite lapse of two years compliance has not been made and learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to diligently pursue this petition. Today, this petition is fixed for non-prosecution. Once again, learned counsel for the petitioner is called absent without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith pending application(s). HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
